patch.value: Systematic read-only audit of CLI command surface, agent ergonomics, schema/config subsystem, and contract coverage. Scope: src/cli/, src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts, src/core/config/, src/core/schema/, src/core/store/settings-validator.ts, governance logic, docs/COMMANDS.md, docs/CONFIGURATION.md, docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md. Methodology: rg/grep/Read code, run pm --help/contracts/schema, cross-reference existing children of pm-mpbb and pm-8jdc, file OPEN forward backlog items only.

value.author: audit-cli-schema-agent
value.text:
Audit complete. Evidence gathered:
1. pm search missing --updated-after/--updated-before/--created-after/--created-before/--assignee/--sprint/--release/--parent filters vs pm list (src/cli/commands/search.ts SearchOptions interface + SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS). Not in MCP TOOL_SEARCH_FILTER_OPTION_CONTRACTS either.
2. pm context has no --parent/--epic scope filter (ContextOptions interface, no parent field; register-operations.ts context registration).
3. show-status missing from all 3 shell completions (bash line 416, zsh line 1033, fish line 1891 in completion.ts) — SCHEMA_SUBCOMMANDS has it but hand-maintained lists don't.
4. id_prefix, author_default, output.default_format, locks.ttl_seconds NOT in pm config set (not in CONFIG_KEY_VALUES nor nested-settings.ts) — require manual settings.json edit.
5. pm schema has no add-field/remove-field/list-fields subcommands — schema/fields.json must be hand-edited; pm schema list does not show runtime fields.
6. schema.unknown_field_policy not settable via pm config set.
7. pm schema apply-preset (standalone) doesn't exist — --type-preset only works on pm init, not already-initialized projects.
8. CONFIGURATION.md has zero mention of schema/fields.json or custom field authoring.
9. pm-haak VERDICT: FIXED. The SettingsPersistSourceSnapshot mechanism in settings.ts (resolvePersistedFileBackedSchemaSections, buildSettingsPersistSourceSnapshot, attachSettingsPersistSourceSnapshot) correctly tracks file-backed source vs merged and restores source-only values on write. close_reason confirms implementation with tests.

patch.value: Items created in this audit session: pm-13nx (search filter parity), pm-ds0m (context --parent scope), pm-6qi8 (completion show-status drift), pm-9byd (config set id_prefix/author_default), pm-vhbf (schema add-field), pm-nnaq (config unknown_field_policy), pm-86ob (schema apply-preset), pm-izx5 (docs fields.json). pm-haak VERDICT: FIXED.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Audit 2026-06-07 (PR pass): CLI/agent-UX findings — SHIPPED pm-g799 (close-reason never-block), pm-ryik (--path .agents/pm discovery), pm-wrqk (dead-code+version dedup). TRACKED: pm-e7dn (runUpdate refactor), pm-vhx6 (compact trailer trim), pm-6l17 (--tags never-block alias), pm-q0kr (slim guided-error boilerplate). See ADR pm-96wm.

value.author: subagent-cli-ux-20260625
value.text: Evidence 2026-06-25 CLI/agent-UX audit: pm-mthy exists on HEAD main; current worktree has completion patch in src/cli/commands/completion.ts and tests/unit/commands/completion-command.spec.ts. Live contracts: package/packages include --declarative; extension does not. pm completion requires guide-shell here. New UX gap: pm package descirbe/catalogx --json treats typo as target and suggests --install <value> instead of did-you-mean describe/catalog.

value.author: codex-audit-20260625
value.text: Audit evidence: CLI/agent UX review fixed concrete lifecycle typo recovery issue pm-js02 so package/extension action typos like descirbe/catalogx/lis/unistall return unknown_lifecycle_action with deterministic suggested_retry instead of misleading install-target guidance.

patch.value: Closed as terminal stale audit container during dedicated tracker-only normalization.
Audit wrapper remains open only while active findings need tracking.
All findings are closed or represented by current backlog; descendant check found no open child work.
Stale audit wrapper normalized by pm-psc0: all child/follow-up work is closed or represented by current backlog; no open descendants remain.
